flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Alvin Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.7k → $1.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Alvin Community College rose 24% between 2020 and 2023 (55.4% → 68.6%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Alvin Community College fell 21% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.8k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Alvin Community College are 17% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($45.8k vs $39.2k).
